steps.title: Use substitution to test which point satisfies the inequality
steps.content: To find a solution to $y \leq 4x - 18$, substitute each point's $(x, y)$ coordinates and check if the inequality is true. We'll use backsolving, starting with a middle choice.

steps.title: Backsolve through choices B and C
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing Choice B — (0,18) (0, 18):
$$18 \leq 4(0) - 18 = -18$$
Fails. Testing Choice C — (4,-18) (4, -18):
$$-18 \leq 4(4) - 18 = 16 - 18 = -2$$
This is true — Choice C — (4,-18) is a solution. That matches Choice C — (4,-18).
